summary: 0 task aperti. 98 completati (102 totale). 102 file test (97 unit, 12 E2E, 2 UAT). CI include Playwright E2E. Coverage: 72% (target 80%). Gap: lib/company/ e Python offices non coperti.

notes: 397 test passanti su 19 file (era 365 su 17).
